runtime_event_log_runtimegraph_pr.title: Runtime event log RuntimeGraph source of truth

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: StateManager is used as a baseDir carrier. Production agent-memory read/write goes through knowledgeMemoryStoreForStateManager(stateManager), which currently returns KnowledgeMemoryStateStore.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: AgentMemoryStore is persisted by rewriting generic Soil records for entries/corrections/state. Claims, evidence refs, tombstones, conflicts, recall records, and projections are not first-class typed owner tables.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore in control DB with typed claim/evidence/correction/tombstone/conflict/recall/projection tables; Soil receives projections from this store.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: StateManager is used to resolve baseDir. loadDomainKnowledge/saveDomainKnowledge use KnowledgeMemoryStateStore.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: DomainKnowledge entries are stored as generic Soil records, not claim records linked to evidence/correction/conflict/projection lifecycle.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: Knowledge entries become MemoryClaim claim_type=fact records with goal scope and typed evidence; existing KnowledgeEntry APIs adapt to the typed truth store.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: StateManager is used to resolve baseDir for shared knowledge reads and writes.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: SharedKnowledgeEntry records are stored as generic Soil records and do not carry first-class claim lifecycle/projection records.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: Shared knowledge entries become scoped MemoryClaim records with evidence and projection metadata.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.current_owner: AgentMemoryStore.corrections inside KnowledgeMemoryStateStore plus Runtime Event Log authority trace
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: StateManager supplies baseDir and RuntimeEvidenceLedger path; correction persistence for agent_memory currently rewrites the agent memory store.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: Correction entry exists as schema but not as indexed first-class transaction participant with tombstones, conflicts, projection records, and recall records.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: CorrectionRef rows update claim lifecycle, replacement links, tombstone/conflict rows, recall/projection rows, RuntimeGraph refs, and event-log evidence in one unit of work.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.current_owner: RuntimeEvidenceLedger for non-agent memory correction ledger; Soil repository has soil_corrections for Soil records
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: StateManager resolves baseDir and scope; non-agent correction requires goal or run scope.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.direct_file_truth_write: RuntimeEvidenceLedger remains file-backed under runtime evidence artifacts.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: Non-agent memory corrections are not unified with agent-memory claim truth maintenance.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore stores CorrectionRef rows for agent_memory and soil_record targets; runtime_evidence/dream_checkpoint remain scoped runtime evidence boundary unless migrated by a later owner slice.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.current_owner: Soil SQLite repository plus explicit Markdown import/publish/debug artifacts
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: SoilRebuildTool may use StateManager only to resolve baseDir.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.direct_file_truth_write: Markdown projections/import queue/publish artifacts are explicit Soil boundary artifacts.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: Soil can store statuses and corrections but does not currently consume a single typed claim truth-maintenance contract for source claim lifecycle.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: Soil projections read MemoryTruthProjection records and source claim lifecycle before publish/query/rebuild.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: No normal StateManager raw read/write; legacy graph path retained as compatibility constructor input.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: Graph nodes/edges link knowledge entries but not MemoryClaim/EvidenceRef/CorrectionRef/ConflictSet/ProjectionRecord truth-maintenance records.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: Add graph/projection records for claim/evidence/correction/conflict/projection refs and block invalidated claim resurrection.

current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.state_manager_usage: No normal StateManager raw read/write; legacy memory/vector-index.json is doctor/repair import input only.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.typed_owner_gap: Semantic index entries are separate from recall records and claim invalidation status.
current_memory_knowledge_soil_owners.migration_target: Recall records must state semantic, semantic_unavailable, lexical, exact, or graph mode and carry safe projection/provenance status.

production_caller_paths_to_migrate.current_owner: AgentMemoryStore filtered in memory by exact/lexical/semantic modes
production_caller_paths_to_migrate.target_owner: MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore.recallClaims returning typed RecallRecord/provenance and adapted agent-memory entries

production_caller_paths_to_migrate.current_owner: applyAgentMemoryCorrection rewrites AgentMemoryStore; non-agent corrections append RuntimeEvidenceLedger

production_caller_paths_to_migrate.target_owner: Typed recall/projection results filtered by lifecycle and normal-surface safety
Typed recall/projection contract and Soil projection lifecycle filters
Soil projections generated from MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore source claim state

production_caller_paths_to_migrate.current_owner: RuntimeEventLogStore and RuntimeGraph are present on base
production_caller_paths_to_migrate.target_owner: Memory truth mutations append memory.truth_maintenance recorded events or authority trace refs before projection visibility

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.typed_store: target control DB memory truth tables

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.typed_store: Soil SQLite plus target MemoryTruthProjection records
repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.guardrail_status: database-first guard allowlist plus new memory truth guard

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.production_owner: currently KnowledgeMemoryStateStore and KnowledgeGraphStateStore; target MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore plus KnowledgeGraphStateStore
repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.typed_store: target memory truth tables and control DB graph/vector rows
repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.transaction_boundary: target MemoryTruthUnitOfWork plus graph store transactions
repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.guardrail_status: to be added in this PR

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.typed_store: control DB interaction authority, permission, approval tables
repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.guardrail_status: covered by database-first and runtime event-log tests

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.typed_store: control DB schedule and drive tables

repo_wide_runtime_state_ownership_invent.guardrail_status: covered by database-first guard and event-log replay tests

implemented_in_branch.memory_soil_knowledge_owner: MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore is now the production typed owner for agent memory, domain knowledge, shared knowledge, correction refs, tombstones, conflicts, recall records, projection records, and memory projection metadata.
production_paths_migrated: KnowledgeManager domain/shared knowledge load/save/query adapters -> MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore
KnowledgeQueryTool semantic requests -> explicit semantic/semantic_unavailable mode contract
Soil agent memory projection after save/correction/forget/retract/conflict
Soil runtime rebuild -> KnowledgeMemoryStateStore truth-aware loads -> MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore
RuntimeEventLogStore memory.truth_maintenance.recorded event and rebuild summary
fresh_audit_remediation: Inactive agent-memory and correction audit records now write inactive Soil records with sanitized normal-search text plus lifecycle/status metadata; product gauntlet exercises SqliteSoilRepository.searchLexical and compileSoilContextFromRepository.

Memory truth correction transactions now insert memory.truth_maintenance.recorded and RuntimeGraph nodes inside the same control DB transaction; runtime_event failure injection proves rollback leaves no truth rows or event rows.
User memory correction traces are recorded after the truth transaction succeeds, preventing authority/runtime evidence from claiming an uncommitted correction.

KnowledgeManager.correctAgentMemory now supplies the typed correction commit hook, so dream_lint auto-repair uses the same correction transaction and Event Log / RuntimeGraph event path as CLI/tool memory corrections.

Domain/shared knowledge owner loads now treat inactive truth rows as authoritative truth presence, so stale Soil compatibility records cannot resurrect superseded knowledge when active truth is empty.

KnowledgeQueryTool semantic requests now report semantic_unavailable with lexicalFallbackUsed=true when the semantic index is unavailable and do not silently return keyword results as semantic results.

KnowledgeMemoryStateStore direct compatibility loads and Soil runtime rebuild now treat inactive domain/shared truth as authoritative, merge typed truth goal scopes, and overwrite stale shared/domain projections with empty active output instead of resurrecting stale Soil records.
CLI governance export redacts all inactive agent-memory content, including corrected, superseded, archived, quarantined, forgotten, retracted, and conflicted entries.

Conflicted agent-memory claims are typed as conflicted, load through the production KnowledgeManager API after restart, remain withheld from normal recall, and record withheld claim IDs with safeForNormalProjection=false.

Post-correction Soil projection runs with persistTruth=false, and MemoryTruthMaintenanceStore.upsertCorrection preserves existing CorrectionRef runtime_event_ref and runtime_graph_refs during later owner snapshots, so user/dream_lint correction linkage survives subsequent normal memory saves.

Agent-memory active/safe projection checks now require correction_state.active=true across recall, truth lifecycle, Soil projection, dream duplicate grouping, dream Soil mutation, and planning projections; active-looking inactive entries are withheld from normal recall and search.
implemented_in_branch.guardrail_added: check:database-first-legacy-stores fails production memory/knowledge/Soil StateManager.writeRaw calls through memory-knowledge-raw-state-manager-write.
representative_tests_added: src/platform/knowledge/__tests__/knowledge-manager-lint.test.ts correction refs retain runtime event and RuntimeGraph refs after Soil projection
src/platform/knowledge/__tests__/knowledge-memory-state-store.test.ts inactive truth blocks stale Soil fallback and correction_state inactive memory is withheld from recall/truth/Soil

src/platform/corrections/__tests__/user-memory-operations.test.ts user correction refs retain runtime event and RuntimeGraph refs after Soil projection and a later normal KnowledgeManager.saveAgentMemory snapshot
src/platform/soil/__tests__/soil-runtime-rebuild-import.test.ts inactive domain/shared truth blocks runtime rebuild resurrection
